title: artanthe scabrifolia
intro: Artanthe scabrifolia, also known as the rough-barked artanthe, is a tropical plant species in the family Achariaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds in its leaves and stems. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, offering health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Artanthe scabrifolia are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
